visuals.title: Process Tree Hierarchy with PIDs and PPIDs
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Process Tree Hierarchy with PIDs and PPIDs
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Process Identifiers</text>
  
  <!-- Process Box -->
  <rect x="160" y="80" width="100" height="60" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Process
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- PID -->
  <rect x="185" y="105" width="50" height="20" fill="#1565C0" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="118" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    PID: 1234
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- PPID -->
  <rect x="185" y="130" width="50" height="20" fill="#1565C0" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="143" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    PPID: 567
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Parent Process -->
  <rect x="60" y="150" width="100" height="60" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="165" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Parent Process
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="110" y="195" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    PID: 567
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Child Process -->
  <rect x="260" y="150" width="100" height="60" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="165" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Child Process
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="310" y="195" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    PPID: 1234
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrows -->
  <path d="M110 180 L160 110" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M260 110 L310 180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Arrowhead definition -->
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="10" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  
  <!-- Labels -->
  <text x="135" y="170" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    creates
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="285" y="170" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    inherits PPID
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Legend -->
  <rect x="20" y="250" width="380" height="80" fill="white" rx="5" stroke="#BBDEFB" stroke-width="1" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="265" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Process Identifier Types
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="40" y="285" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    • PID (Process ID): Unique identifier for each process
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="40" y="300" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    • PPID (Parent Process ID): ID of the process that created this process
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="40" y="315" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    • Processes inherit PPID from their parent process
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>

diagrams.title: Process Tree Hierarchy with PIDs and PPIDs
